nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: Speckle-chested piculet
nodes.summary: Speckle-chested piculet（Speckle-chested piculet，学名 Picumnus steindachneri），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，主要分布于原始森林、次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It mostly inhabits humid lowland primary forest and montane forest with vines, epiphytes and bamboos, but it also occurs in mature secondary forest

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It mostly inhabits humid lowland primary forest and montane forest with vines, epiphytes and bamboos, but it also occurs in mature secondary forest

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It mostly inhabits humid lowland primary forest and montane forest with vines, epiphytes and bamboos, but it also occurs in mature secondary forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is known from only a few locations across a very limited range. Its population is estimated at between 6000 and 15,000 mature individuals and is believed to be decreasing. The primary threat is continuing deforestation for timber and clearance for coffee plantations, cattle grazing, and other agriculture. It has been noted as uncommon to fairly common at scattered sites
